output.summary: Conditional approval with named controls. 1 unresolved reviewer action(s); evidence quality is usable.
required_actions: Ask the domain owner whether regulatory compliance obligations apply.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.role: Normalizes evaluator input into the Parallax42 compliance case shape.

agents.name: Evidence Retrieval Agent
agents.role: Maps supplied evidence text and local reference signals into review context.

agents.name: Privacy Specialist
agents.role: Checks DPA, subprocessor, retention, deletion, and cross-border data controls.

agents.name: Security Specialist
agents.role: Checks SOC 2, ISO 27001, identity, access, logging, and integration controls.

agents.name: Responsible AI Specialist
agents.role: Checks model-training ambiguity, human oversight, and no-auto-approval boundaries.

agents.name: Learning & Precedent Specialist
agents.role: Adds governed precedent context without changing deterministic decisions.

agents.name: Deterministic Decision Owner
agents.role: Runs the local rules engine and owns the final non-LLM decision.

agents.name: Audit Packager
agents.role: Packages the structured response, trace, and reviewer actions.
